note: Videos exclude 2026 data. Constructor videos combine SQLite 1950-2017, Jolpica 2018, and processed 2019-2025 rows.

videos.title: Constructor Season Points Race-by-Race Progress, 1950-2025
videos.description: Animated bar chart of constructor season cumulative points after each race. Points reset each season.

videos.title: Constructor All-Time Points Race-by-Race Progress, 1950-2025
videos.description: Animated bar chart of all-time constructor cumulative points after each race. Points do not reset by season.

videos.title: Driver Points Race-by-Race Progress, 2019-2025
videos.description: Animated bar chart of driver cumulative points after each race.
